resources.string: Monitors app launches to show learning cards
Instead of scrolling, learn one useful thing.\nPauseCard shows a 15-second micro-learning card before addictive apps open.
PauseCard needs to detect which apps you open. This requires Usage Access permission.\n\nTap \"Grant\" to open system settings, then find PauseCard and enable it.
PauseCard shows learning cards as an overlay on top of other apps.\n\nTap \"Grant\" and enable \"Display over other apps\" for PauseCard.
PauseCard runs as a foreground service to monitor apps reliably.\n\nTap \"Grant\" to allow the notification (required for the service to run).
During focus hours, Continue button is hidden (must wait full 15 seconds)
